Data Source

Upload your own event-level CSV export to re-run the entire analysis on your own data, or reset to the bundled sample dataset.
⇪
Drag & drop a CSV file here
or choose a file from your computer
Expected columns (header row required, extra columns are ignored):

session_id, device, traffic_source, country, product_category, stage, event_timestamp, order_value (optional)

stage must use one of: visit, product_view, add_to_cart, checkout, purchase. Each row is one event; a session can have multiple rows, one per stage it reached. order_value is only read from purchase rows.
